What is the standard form of a quadratic: 二次方形的标准形式是什么?
y = ax² + bx + c: y = ax2 + bx + c = ax2 + bx + c
What is the graph of a quadratic functio: 二次函数的图形叫什么?
x = −b/(2a) — the vertical line through: x=-b/(2a) - 通过顶部的垂直线
What are the x-intercepts (zeros/roots)?: X 拦截(零/基层)是什么?
The points where y = 0 — the parabola cr: y = 0 - 抛物线横过 x 轴的点
